response.content:
Gmail is now connected and active. The Gmail extension was installed and activated successfully — all 6 Gmail capabilities (list, get, send, create draft, reply, trash) are available to use. No additional OAuth or credential step was required.

You can now ask me to read your inbox, send emails, reply, or manage drafts.
